name: Claude Wrapped
description: Spotify Wrapped for Claude Code. Visualize your AI coding stats from session transcripts.

generate.label: Generate Wrapped
generate.description: Generate a Claude Code Wrapped HTML report from one or more pasted session JSONL files.

inputs.name: jsonl_sessions
inputs.label: Session JSONL
inputs.description: Paste the full contents of one or more ~/.claude/projects/<project>/<session>.jsonl files. Separate multiple sessions with a line containing only '---'.

inputs.name: author
inputs.label: Author
inputs.description: Display name for the report header.

inputs.name: project_slug
inputs.label: Project Slug
inputs.description: Slug used to group sessions under a single project bucket.
